name: algomim
description: Ask Algomim to answer or review bounded technical, design, and research tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Algomim for a focused response.
interface.longDescription: Send a bounded technical, design, or research task to Algomim and work with its response inside Codex. Codex can ask Algomim again as the task evolves.
defaultPrompt: Ask Algomim to review this implementation.
